command:
python -c 
import urllib.request, os

urls_to_try = [
    'https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2669973/pdf/tjp0587-0819.pdf',
    'https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC2669973/pdf/tjp0587-0819.pdf',
]

out = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1113_jphysiol.2008.161240/files/chen_2009_dsgc-tuning.pdf'

headers = {
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; research bot; mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk)',
    'Accept': 'application/pdf,*/*',
}

for url in urls_to_try:
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp:
            content_type = resp.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
            data = resp.read()
            print(f'URL: {url}')
            print(f'Status: {resp.status}, Content-Type: {content_type}')
            print(f'Size: {len(data):,} bytes, First bytes: {data[:8]}')
            if data[:4] == b'%PDF':
                with open(out, 'wb') as f:
                    f.write(data)
                print(f'Saved PDF to {out}')
                break
            else:
                print('Not a PDF')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'Error for {url}: {e}')
